productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue checked shirt with hints of red, yellow and white made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, patch pocket with a buttoned closure, branding above the left pocket and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis navy blue checked shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
